meaning: n.地域,地带,地区,环带,圈vt.环绕,使分成地带vi.分成区
examples: The area has been declared a disaster zone.
The new treaty establishes a free trade zone.
More troops are being despatched to the war zone.
There will be an exclusion zone during the Olympic Games covering almost all of Weymouth Bay.
The city doubled the cordon zone in 2007 and reduced the enforcement period by one hour.
